code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, n)
  i = i + 1
end

let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

mut lo = 0
mut hi = nums.len()
mut found = -1
while lo < hi
  let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
  let v = match nums.get(mid)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if v == target
    found = mid
    lo = hi
  else if v < target
    lo = mid + 1
  else
    hi = mid
  end
end

if found >= 0
  print("index=#{found}")
else
  print("not_found")
end
